text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Today's lucky food iiis... shrimp tempura! Shrimpy
tempy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hi there! One bowl of tempura soba, please!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the tempura we serve changes each season,
so we're offering vegetable tempura right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her lucky food off the menu, Copano Rickey
is left disappointed...
